name: rentflow
description: RentFlow — Property Management System for Uganda and East Africa

scripts.build: cd server && npm ci && npx prisma generate
scripts.start: cd server && npx prisma db push && node src/app.js
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
